items.title: Kimi K3, and what we can still learn from the pelican benchmark
items.title_zh: Kimi K3 与鹈鹕基准测试的启示
items.title_en: Kimi K3 and Lessons from the Pelican Benchmark
items.summary: Analysis of the Kimi K3 model's performance on the pelican benchmark reveals issues with benchmark design and hidden prompts in token counts.

items.title: Firefox in WebAssembly
items.title_zh: Firefox 编译为 WebAssembly 在另一浏览器中运行
items.title_en: Firefox Compiled to WebAssembly Runs Inside Another Browser
items.summary: A project successfully compiled Mozilla Firefox to WebAssembly, enabling the entire browser to run within another browser.

items.title: AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion
items.title_zh: AWS计费错误显示17亿美元预估账单
items.title_en: AWS Billing Bug Shows $1.7B Estimated Bill
items.summary: AWS billing system shows erroneous $1.7B estimated bills due to unit conversion error.

items.title: First atmosphere found on Earth-like planet in habitable zone of distant star
items.title_zh: 在宜居带类地系外行星上首次探测到大气
items.title_en: First atmosphere detected on Earth-like exoplanet in habitable zone
items.summary: First atmosphere detected on a potentially Earth-like planet in the habitable zone of a red dwarf, challenging assumptions about atmospheric retention.

items.title: The state of open source AI
items.title_en: Mozilla Report on Open Source AI Sparks Debate
items.summary: A report on the state of open source AI from Mozilla, sparking debate on open vs closed models.

items.title: EU AI Act OpenRAG: 933 legally structured chunks and BGE-M3 embeddings in one SQLite file [P]
items.title_zh: EU AI Act OpenRAG：基于法律结构化分块与BGE-M3嵌入的语料库
items.title_en: EU AI Act OpenRAG: Legal-Structured Chunks with BGE-M3 Embeddings
items.summary: Release of a structured, legally-chunked corpus of the EU AI Act with BGE-M3 embeddings, demonstrating improved retrieval performance over baseline for RAG applications.

items.title: Truth Social 将向华尔街出售特朗普帖子的快速访问权限
items.title_zh: Truth Social 将向华尔街出售特朗普帖子的实时访问权限
items.title_en: Truth Social to Sell Real-Time Trump Posts to Wall Street via API
items.summary: Truth Social will sell real-time access to Trump's posts to institutional investors via a new API, aiming to monetize data for high-frequency trading.

items.title: 📱华为昇腾 950 超节点首次公开亮相，算力达英伟达同级 6.7 倍
items.title_zh: 华为昇腾950超节点首发，算力号称英伟达6.7倍
items.title_en: Huawei Ascend 950 SuperNode Debuts, Claims 6.7x NVIDIA's Compute
items.summary: Huawei unveils its Ascend 950 SuperNode at WAIC, claiming 6.7x the compute power of NVIDIA's equivalent NVL144 system.
